name: Hypothalamic programming of systemic ageing involving IKK-beta, NF-kappaB and GnRH
short_name: Hypothalamic NF-kappaB and GnRH aging program
summary: A mouse study reporting that hypothalamic IKK-beta/NF-kappaB activation contributes to systemic aging phenotypes and that immune inhibition or GnRH restoration can slow aging-related changes in mice.
